content: Task task-015 requires Zustand state management with persisted storage. I need to add `zustand` and `@react-native-async-storage/async-storage` dependencies to implement the required timer store persist middleware (AsyncStorage-backed) and keep type-safe imports/builds. Proceeding with these dependency additions for this task.

Task task-015 blocker: npm registry access is unavailable in this environment (`ENOTFOUND registry.npmjs.org`), so I cannot install new deps (`zustand`, `@react-native-async-storage/async-storage`). I am proceeding with an in-repo fallback implementation for the timer store using existing project storage abstractions to unblock dependent tasks.
